rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
rulings.Rulings: continued to november 30, 2016. as of 11/14/16, no proof of publication of amended petition on file and supplemental declaration filed did not address whether box #5.a. 1 or 2 should have been checked. in addition, there are two Requests for Special Notice on file in this matter and the Proof of Service filed does not show they received notice and a copy of the amended petition as required (for hearing on 11/30, notice must be mailed no later than 11/15/16, with new Proof of Service filed before the new deadline). new deadline for clearing the notes in order to avoid an automatic continuance is wednesday, november 23, 2016.
